events.text: Gemma multi-cam localized the object (0.5cm error)
base drove to the counter — real velocity control
grasp attempt 1 — trajectory stops too high (depth error)
holding(object)? Gemma: NO — “food object is on counter”
predicate failed → REPLAN: re-perceive and retry the trajectory
holding(object)? Gemma: YES — “robot is holding the object”
carrying object to the sink and releasing
in(object, sink)? Gemma: YES — “food is inside the sink”
